name: hoc/dual-app-sidebar
description: A high-level dual-rail application sidebar HOC: combines a slim icon rail with a swappable secondary panel and main inset body. Accepts a rail header, structured sections (icon + grouped menu items + optional footer), an optional rail footer (icon items or JSX), and body content. Built on top of DualSidebar primitives and SidebarMenuTree, with full keyboard/mobile support inherited from DualSidebarProvider.
useCases: VS Code-like layouts: persistent activity bar plus contextual secondary navigation
Multi-module SaaS apps where each top-level module has its own grouped sub-navigation
Admin consoles needing both global icon shortcuts and rich nested menus per area
Documentation portals with persistent rail and per-area sub-trees plus a main reading pane
usage: import { DualAppSidebar, type DualAppSidebarProps, type DualAppSidebarSection, type DualAppSidebarRailFooterItem } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/dual-app-sidebar"
